PSIRT
Cross-Site Scripting in Domain parameter
Summary
An Improper Neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tags in a Web Page (Basic XSS) vulnerability [CWE-80] in FortiSIEM may allow a privileged administrator to execute unauthorized commands via crafted requests.
Version
Affected
Solution
FortiSIEM 7.5
Not affected
Not Applicable
FortiSIEM 7.4
7.4.0
Upgrade to 7.4.1 or above
FortiSIEM 7.3
7.3.0 through 7.3.4
Upgrade to 7.3.5 or above
FortiSIEM 7.2
7.2.0 through 7.2.6
Upgrade to 7.2.7 or above
FortiSIEM 7.1
7.1 all versions
Migrate to a fixed release
FortiSIEM 7.0
7.0 all versions
Migrate to a fixed release

6.7 all versions
Migrate to a fixed release

6.6 all versions
Migrate to a fixed release

6.5 all versions
Migrate to a fixed release
FortiSIEM 6.4
6.4 all versions
Migrate to a fixed release
Acknowledgement
Fortinet is pleased to thank Anis MESSAOUDI from CPA Bank for reporting this vulnerability under responsible disclosure.
